articles.title: Arsenal set to celebrate St Totteringham's Day earlier than ever
articles.summary: The day it becomes impossible for Spurs to finish above Arsenal in the Premier League, St Totteringham's Day is set to arrive earlier than ever.

articles.title: 'You can't avoid the political climate' -  Fishlock on EuroGames 'honour'
articles.summary: Jess Fishlock, generally regarded as Wales' greatest ever female footballer, says she felt compelled to become an ambassador for the 2027 EuroGames in Cardiff due to the "political climate right now" ...

articles.title: 'World-class save' - How Pickford & Everton thwarted Newcastle
articles.summary: Match of the Day pundits Alan Shearer and Ashley Williams react to Jordan Pickford's "remarkable" injury-time save against Newcastle.

articles.title: 'Not fair to fans' - how VAR denied Burnley one of greatest comebacks
articles.summary: Burnley were set to complete one of the greatest Premier League comebacks - until VAR intervened. BBC Sport takes a look at whether the decisions were correct.

articles.title: New set-piece kings Liverpool can still achieve 'something beautiful'
articles.summary: Liverpool boosted their Champions League hopes with a 5-2 win against West Ham, helped by three goals from set-pieces in the first half.

articles.title: 'Not the sign of a top team' - Newcastle take huge step backwards
articles.summary: Newcastle are languishing in 12th place in the Premier League for a reason - they have conceded 23 goals since they last kept a clean sheet in any competition.

articles.title: 'Manager of season contender' Andrews has Brentford dreaming of Europe
articles.summary: That Brentford are seventh in the Premier League is credit to Keith Andrews, who - it is easy to forget - is in his debut season as a manager.

articles.title: Boos heard during Ramadan pause at Elland Road
articles.summary: Boos are heard during a brief break in play to allow players observing Ramadan to break their fast during Saturday's match between Leeds United and Manchester City.

articles.title: Liverpool score five in dominant win over West Ham
articles.summary: Liverpool put five past West Ham United in a dominant performance that moves them up to fifth in the Premier League table.

articles.title: Pickford and Barry heroics earn Everton late win at Newcastle
articles.summary: Thierno Barry responds to Newcastle's late equaliser with a goal of his own to see Everton beat Newcastle 3-2.

articles.title: Semenyo makes the difference as Man City beat Leeds
articles.summary: Antoine Semenyo's goal for Man City moments before half-time is enough to beat Leeds United and close in on leaders Arsenal in the Premier League.

articles.title: Late Brentford winner thwarts spirited Burnley comeback
articles.summary: Brentford hold on as Burnley have their three-goal comeback against squashed by Mikel Damsgaard's injury-time winner, with Ashley Barnes' last gasp equaliser ruled out.

articles.title: Evanilson goal extends Bournemouth unbeaten run
articles.summary: Bournemouth's unbeaten run extends to eight Premier League games after coming from behind to draw 1-1 with Sunderland.

articles.title: How one of Europe's best defences has Motherwell in title mix
articles.summary: BBC Scotland examines Motherwell's incredible defensive record as they move into the Scottish Premiership title mix.

articles.title: 'Out of absolutely nothing' - Lamine Yamal's solo stunner
articles.summary: Lamine Yamal goes on a brilliant solo run before curling an effort into the far corner to score his second goal, en route to his first career hat-trick in Barcelona's 4-1 win over Villarreal in La Lig...

articles.title: Green wins Women's World Championship for second time
articles.summary: Australian Hannah Green won the HSBC Women's World Championship for a second time after holding off fast-finishing American Auston Kim to claim a one-stroke victory.

articles.summary: Watch the highlights from the Las Vegas Super League showdown between Hull KR and Leeds Rhinos
